GRP_SPCH_THRPY_WK_1_NUM O0401CC SLP: Total Minutes Group Therapy Week 1 NUM 22 This indicates the total number of group speech-language pathology therapy minutes provided in the first week
of stay.
239 CO_TRTMT_SPCH_THRPY_WK_1_NUM CO_TRTMT_SPCH_THRPY_WK_1_NUM O0401CD SLP: Total Minutes Co-treatment Therapy Week 1 NUM 22 This indicates the total number of co-treatment speech-language pathology therapy minutes provided in the first
week of stay.
240 INDVDL_PT_WK_2_NUM INDVDL_PT_WK_2_NUM O0402AA
